hero.title: Transform your body with a clear, guided system.
hero.description: Personalized coaching that combines training, nutrition, wellness direction, and real follow-up — built around your body, lifestyle, and goals.

coach.title: The coach behind the O2F system.
coach.bio: Osama Omran focuses on body transformation through a connected system that combines training, nutrition guidance, wellness direction, and practical follow-up. His approach is built around clarity, sustainability, and real progress — not random advice or short-term motivation.

journey.title: Choose your goal
journey.desc: Training transformation, anti-aging guidance, or Methylene Blue education.

journey.title: Get a clear plan
journey.desc: Training, nutrition, lifestyle, and follow-up are connected in one route.

journey.title: Start with support
journey.desc: Clear next steps, direct guidance, and a practical system to follow.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.desc: Your goal, body, lifestyle, and current level are reviewed first.

steps.title: Personalized plan
steps.desc: You receive a route built around training, nutrition, and the support you need.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.desc: The plan evolves with your progress so the transformation stays realistic.

results.title: Visible progress with a structured system.
results.desc: Results come from clear planning, consistent follow-up, and practical adjustments over time.

contact.title: Ready to start your transformation?
contact.desc: Choose the path that fits your goal, and start with a system built around clarity, support, and real follow-up.

faq.a: No. It connects training, nutrition, wellness direction, and follow-up.
Send your goal and current level, and the suitable route can be selected.

plans.title: Choose the level that matches your goal.
plans.desc: Select the number of months and see how the total changes. Longer plans give better value.

items.name: Basic Plan
items.blurb: For people who need a clean first step with training and nutrition direction.

items.name: Standard Plan
items.blurb: The balanced option for stronger follow-up and a more complete route.

items.name: Premium Plan
items.blurb: For deeper follow-up, premium guidance, and stronger accountability.

programs.title: Three clear routes inside one transformation system.
programs.desc: Each program explains who it is for, what it includes, and what the visitor should expect.

tabs.label: Anti-Aging
tabs.title: Anti-Aging & Long-Term Vitality
tabs.desc: A guided route focused on recovery, vitality, sustainable habits, and better daily performance.

cards.label: For whom?
cards.text: People who want more energy, better recovery, and a healthier routine.

cards.label: Includes
cards.text: Lifestyle assessment, recovery direction, nutrition support, and follow-up.

cards.label: Expected result
cards.text: A clearer routine that supports vitality and consistency.

tabs.label: Methylene Blue
tabs.title: Methylene Blue Education & Guidance
tabs.desc: A simple educational route that explains the idea clearly and guides the visitor toward the right next step.

cards.label: For whom?
cards.text: People interested in focus, energy, and cellular-performance concepts.

cards.label: Includes
cards.text: Simple explanation, guided understanding, and consultation-first direction.

cards.label: Safe next step
cards.text: Ask, explore, and move forward with guidance instead of guessing.

tabs.label: Training Transformation
tabs.title: Training Transformation
tabs.desc: A structured route that combines training, nutrition, and follow-up to drive visible physical transformation.

cards.label: For whom?
cards.text: Beginners, returning trainees, and people who need clear structure.

cards.label: Includes
cards.text: Training plan, nutrition direction, weekly tracking, and adjustments.

cards.label: Goal examples
cards.text: Fat loss, muscle gain, recomposition, strength, and discipline.

hero.title: حوّل جسمك بنظام واضح ومتابعة حقيقية.
hero.description: كوتشينج شخصي يجمع بين التدريب، التغذية، التوجيه الصحي، والمتابعة العملية — مبني على جسمك، أسلوب حياتك، وهدفك.

coach.title: المدرب وراء نظام O2F.
coach.bio: أسامة عمران يركز على التحول البدني من خلال نظام متصل يجمع التدريب، التغذية، التوجيه الصحي، والمتابعة العملية. الهدف هو الوضوح والاستمرارية والنتائج الواقعية.

journey.title: اختار هدفك
journey.desc: تحول بدني، توجيه Anti-Aging، أو تثقيف عن Methylene Blue.

journey.title: استلم خطة واضحة
journey.desc: التدريب والتغذية ونمط الحياة والمتابعة في مسار واحد.

journey.title: ابدأ بدعم مستمر
journey.desc: خطوات واضحة وتوجيه عملي بدل العشوائية والتجربة والخطأ.

steps.title: التقييم
steps.desc: نراجع هدفك، جسمك، نمط حياتك، ومستواك الحالي.

steps.title: خطة مخصصة
steps.desc: تستلم مسار يجمع التدريب والتغذية والدعم المناسب لك.

steps.title: متابعة وتعديل
steps.desc: الخطة تتطور مع تقدمك عشان التحول يفضل واقعي ومستمر.

results.title: تقدم واضح بنظام منظم.
results.desc: النتائج بتظهر لما يكون فيه خطة واضحة، متابعة مستمرة، وتعديلات عملية حسب الاستجابة.

contact.title: جاهز تبدأ تحولك؟
contact.desc: ابدأ بالخطوة الأولى، وسيتم توجيهك للمسار الأنسب حسب هدفك وحالتك.

faq.a: لا. النظام يربط التدريب والتغذية والتوجيه الصحي والمتابعة.
أرسل هدفك ومستواك الحالي وهنرشدك للمسار المناسب.

plans.title: اختار المستوى المناسب لهدفك.
plans.desc: الباقات واضحة وسهلة — اختار عدد الشهور وشوف الإجمالي.

items.name: Basic Plan
items.blurb: بداية واضحة لمن يحتاج توجيه تدريب وتغذية.

items.name: Standard Plan
items.blurb: الخيار المتوازن لمتابعة أقوى ومسار أكمل.

items.name: Premium Plan
items.blurb: متابعة أعمق وتوجيه أعلى ومحاسبة أقوى.

programs.title: ثلاث مسارات واضحة داخل نظام تحول واحد.
programs.desc: كل برنامج يوضح مناسب لمين، يشمل إيه، وإيه المتوقع من المتابعة.
